payload.test_results: 28/28 tests passing (19 gap tests + 10 SelectQuestions tests, including 3 property tests)
quality_improvements: Replaced manual bubble sort with sort.Slice (standard library, more idiomatic)
Simplified determineMaxQuestions logic: removed redundant conditions for small gap (consolidated 3 conditions into 1)
Extracted magic numbers to named constants: smallGapMaxQuestions=2, mediumGapMinQuestions=3, mediumGapMaxQuestions=5
Added max() helper function to simplify medium gap logic
Improved code readability: constants make question count limits explicit and self-documenting
Maintained 100% behavior compatibility: all tests pass, including property tests with 100 random cases each

checklist.item: All tests still pass after refactoring

producer_learnings_verified: Producer correctly identified that buildContext fallback behavior is intentional (verified by TestSelectQuestions_IncludesContextInformation)
Producer correctly reverted attempted simplification when test failed, demonstrating TDD discipline
Refactoring decisions well-documented with rationale and alternatives considered
